title: Spicy Malaysian Noodle Soup
description: A flavorful and spicy noodle soup inspired by the flavors of Malaysia. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Bring the xtra to a boil in a large pot.
Add the pungent and cook until softened.
Add the malaysian and cook for 1 minute.
Add the noodles and cook according to package instructions.
Stir in the cheese and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped herbs if desired.
Optional: add protein such as chicken or tofu for added flavor.
